zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor於1305年出生在英國德比夏爾可德諾時，他的父親Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray24歲，母親Joan Fitz Payne25歲。他於大約1325年與Eleanor Courtenay在英國結婚。他去世於1392年12月14日在英國肯特艾勒斯福德享年87歲，埋葬在英國肯特艾勒斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor于1305年出生在英国德比夏爾可德諾时，他的父亲Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray24岁，母亲Joan Fitz Payne25岁。他于大约1325年与Eleanor Courtenay在英国结婚。他去世于1392年12月14日在英国肯特艾勒斯福德享年87岁，埋葬在英国肯特艾勒斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor was born in 1305, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, his father, Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray, was 24 and his mother, Joan Fitz Payne, was 25. He married Eleanor Courtenay about 1325, in England. He died on 14 December 1392, in Aylesford, Kent, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Aylesford, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor est né en 1305, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Fitz Payne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Courtenay environ 1325, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1392, à Aylesford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Aylesford, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor 1305 in Codnor, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray 24 und seine Mutter Joan Fitz Payne 25. Er hat um 1325 in England Eleanor Courtenay geheiratet. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1392 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Aylesford, Kent, England und wurde in Aylesford, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor è nato il nel 1305 nel Codnor, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan Fitz Payne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Courtenay circa 1325, nel England. Morì il 14 dicembre 1392, nel Aylesford, Kent, England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Aylesford, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnorが1305年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで生まれた時，父Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Grayは24歳，母Joan Fitz Payneは25歳であった。約1325年にイギリスでEleanor Courtenayと結婚した。彼は1392年12月14日にイギリスケントエイレスフォードで87歳で死去し，イギリスケントエイレスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor(이)가 1305년 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Fitz Payne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1325년 영국에서 Eleanor Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1392년 12월 14일 영국 켄트 아일레스퍼드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 아일레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor nasceu em 1305, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fitz Payne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Courtenay aproximadamente 1325, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1392, em Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor родился в 1305 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitz Payne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Courtenay около 1325 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 14 декабря 1392 г. в местности аилесфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности аилесфорд, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Codnor nació en 1305, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Grey 2nd Baron de Gray, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Fitz Payne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Eleanor Courtenay aproximadamente 1325, en Inglaterra. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1392, en Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Aylesford, Kent, Inglaterra.
